title: AI Integration
description: Wrap the Anthropic SDK in a context provider and call Claude from reactive effects.
provider_intro: Wrap the Anthropic SDK in a context provider so any child component can call the API. The provider creates the client once. Child components access it via useComplete().
generate_intro: The GenerateHtml component calls useComplete() inside a createEffect. When the prompt signal changes, the effect fires, calls the API, and passes the result to a callback. The untrack guard prevents duplicate generations.
pipeline_intro: The app wires generation and deployment together with Show. When a pending generation exists, GenerateHtml runs. When it produces content, Write saves it to disk, and the site list updates, which triggers AWS deployment downstream.
tip_persistence: AI outputs are persisted like any other useAsyncOutput result. The generation only runs again if its input props change.
